idea-plugin.name: Mekong Tunnel
idea-plugin.description:
Mekong Tunnel — Expose your local dev server to the internet with one click.

  • Start / stop a public tunnel from the side panel
  • Auto-detects the port and framework
  • Supports tunnel expiry (30m, 1h, 7d, 1mo…)
  • Copy or open the public URL instantly
  • Login with your Mekong account for a reserved subdomain
  • Live Server — serve HTML & Markdown with hot reload
  • Activity log shows all tunnel events

Install the mekong CLI first: mekongtunnel.dev
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2
  • Fix Windows binary detection — now correctly finds mekong.exe at %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\mekong\
1.0.1
  • Fix deprecated URL constructor (use URI.toURL())
  • Dark/light theme support — all colors now adapt to IDE theme
  • Device-based browser login flow — no terminal required
  • Fixed plugin icon in Installed Plugins list
1.0.0 — Initial release: tunnel start/stop, live server, login, activity log, status bar widget.
